html:
Exclusive to:

GenericOffBurningBurnt

The Teletransport Station is a special structure that can be placed, crafted and used only by Winona with the Founder's Keepers II skill. Winona can unlock it by using the Calibrated Perceiver on an Unstable Transmission. The Teletransport Station works only if it is powered by a Winona's Generator or Winona's G.E.M.erator.

Winona players with the Founder's Keepers II skill can use the Portasol to teleport to the nearest Teletransport Station. If there is more than one Teletransport Station, Winona can use the Portasol while standing on one of the Teletransport Stations to teleport to the nearest Teletransport Station.

When a player teleports, it can teleport dropped items and mobs (that can be put in the player's inventory) that are very close to them. The player can also teleport while sitting on a Beefalo.

Teleporting longer distance will consume more energy from generators, but doesn't affect the Portasol usage(7%).

Skill Tree

Portability

Winona with the Portability skill can dismantle and pick up a Teletransport Station into the inventory.

Energy-Saver

If a Teletransport Station was placed by Winona with the Energy-Saver skill, it will no longer use energy from generators while is not in use.

Tips

  • Unlike its counterpart in the Hamlet DLC, the Telipad, the Teletransport Station has infinite range.
  • A main use of it in the early game is that it cuts travel time tremendously, teleporting to it is faster than walking.
  • The Teletransport Station is greatly improved by Energy-Saver.
  • One should make sure that the Teletransport Station are equal in distance, because it makes them easier to use and faster. (using a mod can make setting up them a lot easier)
Craftable ItemsStructures

GenericOffBurningBurnt
“It uses displacement theory - things go from displace to datplace.”
–Wilson, Generic
“If something's on fire when it's teleported...”
–Willow, Generic
“Fixing lady doesn't need machine, Wolfgang can help carry!”
–Wolfgang, Generic
“Not everything can be brought back.”
–Wendy, Generic
“THIS DESIGN IS... FAMILIAR”
–WX-78, Generic
“This is rather convenient.”
–Wickerbottom, Generic
“It's like havin' our own shipping depot.”
–Woodie, Generic
“Not bad, for a parlour trick.”
–Maxwell, Generic
“Bring höme the spöils öf war!”
–Wigfrid, Generic
“Aww, it won't work on us.”
–Webber, Generic
“Incroyable!”
–Warly, Generic
“Poof machine!”
–Wormwood, Generic
“Sure beats luggin' stuff around!”
–Winona, Generic
“Imitation is the sincerest form of flattery, hyuyu!”
–Wortox, Generic
“Sometimes free stuff appear!”
–Wurt, Generic
“We can bring all sorts of stuff back to camp!”
–Walter, Generic
“I like this very much.”
–Wanda, Generic
“It needs some electricity.”
–Wilson, Off
“Is this thing on?”
–Willow, Off
“Is not working.”
–Wolfgang, Off
“It's dead...”
–Wendy, Off
“IT'S JUST SLEEPING”
–WX-78, Off
“It requires a power source.”
–Wickerbottom, Off
“Plum tuckered.”
–Woodie, Off
“It's useless out here without power.”
–Maxwell, Off
“It has nö fighting spirit.”
–Wigfrid, Off
“How come it's not on?”
–Webber, Off
“Is it out of power?”
–Warly, Off
“Oh. No poof”
–Wormwood, Off
“I'd better hook it up to some power.”
–Winona, Off
“Playtime's over!”
–Wortox, Off
“Not working, florp.”
–Wurt, Off
“Did someone unplug it?”
–Walter, Off
“Maybe it needs winding?”
–Wanda, Off
“It's on fire!”
–Wilson, Burning
“Hehehe!”
–Willow, Burning
“Is burning!”
–Wolfgang, Burning
“Oh no...”
–Wendy, Burning
“HURRY, SAVE IT”
–WX-78, Burning
“Oh dear, who did this?”
–Wickerbottom, Burning
“Woah! Careful, Lucy!”
–Woodie, Burning
“I'm going to pretend I don't see it.”
–Maxwell, Burning
“Tis engulfed in flame!”
–Wigfrid, Burning
“Oh, oh!”
–Webber, Burning
“It, oh, it appears to be on fire.”
–Warly, Burning
“Stop fire!”
–Wormwood, Burning
“Quick! Put it out!”
–Winona, Burning
“Hoohoohoo!”
–Wortox, Burning
“Don't think that how it supposed to look, florp.”
–Wurt, Burning
“Ah!! That's how forest fires start!”
–Walter, Burning
“That doesn't bode well for us.”
–Wanda, Burning
“Science couldn't save it.”
–Wilson, Burnt
“Well, that was mildly entertaining.”
–Willow, Burnt
“Is all burned up.”
–Wolfgang, Burnt
“It all crumbles to ash, in the end.”
–Wendy, Burnt
“IT WAS A GOOD MACHINE”
–WX-78, Burnt
“I do hope she'll build another.”
–Wickerbottom, Burnt
“That's a right shame.”
–Woodie, Burnt
“Oh. What a pity.”
–Maxwell, Burnt
“'Twas devöured by Hel's fire!”
–Wigfrid, Burnt
“Oh no! It got burnt!”
–Webber, Burnt
“Crisp, non?”
–Warly, Burnt
“Oh...”
–Wormwood, Burnt
“Aw, nuts and bolts!”
–Winona, Burnt
“How hilarious!”
–Wortox, Burnt
“Oh well. Gone now.”
–Wurt, Burnt
“Well... I guess Winona'll have to build a new one.”
–Walter, Burnt
“I wonder how quickly she can build a new one...”
–Wanda, Burnt

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trạm Teletransport là một công trình kiến ​​trúc đặc biệt chỉ có thể được đặt, chế tạo và sử dụng bởi Winona với kỹ năng Founder's Keepers II. Winona có thể mở khóa nó bằng cách sử dụng Bộ thu nhận hiệu chuẩn trên Đường truyền không ổn định. Trạm Teletransport chỉ hoạt động nếu được cấp nguồn bởi Máy phát điện Winona hoặc G.E.M.erator của Winona.
